subparts.text: How does HTTP work when a user requests a webpage? 2.5 CO-1
Briefly explain HTML and its stages. 2.5 CO-1
What are the major limitations of Web 2.0 that led to the development of Web 3.0? 2.5 CO-2
Explain the role of RDF in the Semantic Web with an example. 2.5 CO-2
Define the OSI seven-layer model and briefly describe the function of each layer. 5 CO-1
Describe the major components of an internet service provider and its role in web connectivity. 5 CO-1
Describe any 5 major Internet protocols and their functionalities. 5 CO-1
Discuss the contributions of Sir Tim Berners-Lee to the development of the Semantic Web. How does his vision shape the roadmap of Web 3.0? 5 CO-2
Describe the Semantic Web architecture and the role of different layers in the layered cake model. How do these layers contribute to interoperability on the web? 5 CO-2
The Semantic Web aims to enable machines to understand and process web data intelligently. Identify and discuss two real- world applications of the Semantic Web and their impact on industries. 5 CO-2
